## Summary

- What changed and why (2-5 lines).

## Scope

- Type: `feature` / `fix` / `test` / `ci` / `docs` / `chore`
- Affected areas:
- Out of scope (explicitly list what was intentionally not changed):

## Risk

- Risk level: `low` / `medium` / `high`
- Primary risk:
- Rollback plan:

## Testing Evidence

- [ ] Local checks pass (`npm run mobile:typecheck`, `npm run mobile:test`, `npm run supabase:test`)
- [ ] API smoke checked (`npm run contracts:smoke`)
- [ ] If mobile UI changed: screenshots or short video attached
- [ ] If schema/functions changed: migration and backward-compatibility reviewed
- [ ] If release-path changed: workflow run link attached

## Release Notes

- User-visible change:
- Operator impact (if any):

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is focused on one concern
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials committed
- [ ] Observability/logging impact considered
- [ ] Documentation updated (if behavior/process changed)
